RGLS.notes: Placeholder. Jacobian of parameter-to-loss mapping is extracted.

WS_GNI.notes: Newton-style update using autodiff gradient and Hessian of params_to_loss.

WS_GGHAM_1_dH.notes: First-order gradient-root GHAM update using autodiff gradient and diagonal Hessian approximation from params_to_loss. Tuned on lambda_g=2000, sigma_nu=0.1.

WS_GGHAM_2_I.notes: Second-order gradient-root GHAM update using autodiff gradient and Hessian with identity linear operator.

WS_GGHAM_2_dH.notes: Second-order gradient-root GHAM update using autodiff gradient and Hessian with diagonal-Hessian linear operator.

WS_GGHAM_2_H.notes: Second-order gradient-root GHAM update using autodiff gradient and Hessian with Hessian linear operator.

WS_LGHAM_1_TIK.notes: Placeholder for loss-root GHAM update. Derivatives are available for custom manual rules.

WS_LGHAM_3_TIK.notes: Placeholder for higher-order loss-root GHAM update. Derivatives are available for custom manual rules.
